name: THSV StreamBridge - Discord Chat Archive
author: surakage
description: Delivers bounded, filtered multi-platform public-chat batches to a creator-owned Discord webhook and returns correlated delivery results to StreamBridge.

actions.name: THSV Addon - Discord Chat Archive - Deliver

triggerSafety: Broker-dispatched only. Do not attach platform triggers. A manual run with no delivery arguments sends one safe setup test.
verificationStatus: Source and package structure tested; creator must live-test the private Discord webhook after import.
